prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `292dd178`.
codex_response:
Implemented task `292dd178` as a new ARC2 package. The rule is: each blue `4x4` frame is missing one non-corner border cell; the output fills the `2x2` interior with `2`, restores the missing border cell as `2`, and continues that line straight to the grid edge. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting point and discarded the sonnet hint because it incorrectly inferred inter-rectangle connection behavior; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_292dd178/notes.md#L1).

The package is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_292dd178/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_292dd178/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_292dd178/generator.py#L1). The verifier stays compact and DSL-driven; the generator explicitly places separated `4x4` almost-frames on the official-style background colors and rejects placements that would merge frames or collide with red fill/ray regions. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 292dd178`
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 292dd178 --n-examples 1000`
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 292dd178`

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/292dd178/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/292dd178/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/292dd178/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/292dd178/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/292dd178/previews/preview_03.png). I also visually checked `preview_01.png`; the rebuilt samples look on-family.
